entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, a cereal crop conserved at ICRISAT

entities.name: ICRISAT GENEBANK
entities.description: The facility at ICRISAT that conserves pearl millet germplasm

entities.name: GERMPLASM ACCESSIONS
entities.description: The collection of 23,092 pearl millet genetic resources

entities.name: LANDRACES
entities.description: Local varieties of pearl millet used for investigating trait distribution

entities.name: GEOGRAPHICAL DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The spatial arrangement of traits and diversity in pearl millet

entities.name: TRAIT DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in characteristics among pearl millet landraces

entities.name: LATITUDE
entities.description: The geographic coordinate range (33.00°S to 36.91°N) for pearl millet adaptation

entities.name: EARLY FLOWERING
entities.description: Trait characterized by flowering between 33 and 40 days

entities.name: VERY LATE FLOWERING
entities.description: Trait characterized by flowering between 121 and 159 days

entities.name: SHORT PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: Trait characterized by plant height between 80 and 100 cm

entities.name: TALLNESS
entities.description: Trait characterized by plant height between 401 and 490 cm

entities.name: HIGH TILLERING
entities.description: Trait characterized by 11 to 35 tillers per plant

entities.name: HIGH PANICLE EXSERTION
entities.description: Trait characterized by panicle exsertion between 11 and 29 cm

entities.name: LONG PANICLES
entities.description: Trait characterized by panicle length between 75 and 135 cm

entities.name: THICK PANICLES
entities.description: Trait characterized by panicle thickness between 41 and 58 mm

entities.name: LARGE SEEDS
entities.description: Trait characterized by 1000 seed weight between 16 and 19 g

entities.name: 1000 SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: Trait measuring the weight of 1000 seeds

entities.name: PAKISTAN
entities.description: Country where early flowering pearl millet is predominant

entities.name: GHANA
entities.description: Country where early flowering, high panicle exsertion, and large seeds are predominant

entities.name: TOGO
entities.description: Country where early flowering, thick panicles, and large seeds are predominant

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where early flowering, short plant height, high tillering, and high panicle exsertion are predominant

entities.name: SIERRA LEONE
entities.description: Country where very late flowering pearl millet is predominant

entities.name: CENTRAL AFRICAN REPUBLIC
entities.description: Country where very late flowering and tallness are predominant

entities.name: ZAMBIA
entities.description: Country where short plant height is predominant

entities.name: SUDAN
entities.description: Country where short plant height is predominant

entities.name: CHAD
entities.description: Country where tallness and high panicle exsertion are predominant

entities.name: BURKINA FASO
entities.description: Country where tallness and large seeds are predominant

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: Country where tallness and long panicles are predominant

entities.name: YEMEN
entities.description: Country where high tillering and high panicle exsertion are predominant

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: Country where long panicles are predominant

entities.name: NAMIBIA
entities.description: Country where thick panicles are predominant

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: Country where thick panicles and 1000 seed weight diversity are predominant

entities.name: BENIN
entities.description: Country where large seeds are predominant
